plugins.name: crbiz-pm
plugins.description: CRBiz PM for Claude Code. PM-as-Configuration-Overlay grammar with reference implementations of the Catalyst-app and discovery-strategy archetypes. Install via marketplace on any surface; slash-command invocation runs in Claude Code CLI on a local folder or a Claude Code remote session against a repo (not currently supported in claude.ai/code Cowork). Bidirectional HTML board with IndexedDB-persistent file access, chip-spawn wrapper with per-chip git worktree allocation + MCP smoke-test enforcement, Tie-back protocol, lean PM context. v2.1.2 of the PM-on-CC discipline — six-bug fix release (closes BUG-001 + BUG-008..BUG-012) plus 10 discipline hot-adds from PM self-reviews. 37 skills + 6 agents + SessionStart hook + PreToolUse git-stage-guard hook.

plugins.name: pm-board-keeper
plugins.description: DEPRECATED in favour of crbiz-pm v2.0 (which lifts the pm-board skill + pm-board-keeper agent + 6 pm-board-* commands). Stand up and maintain a single-file HTML PM dashboard (docs/board.html) for chip-spawn workflows.
